_meta.status: TWO items WIRED; the rest are STOPGAPS / UNSOLVED (see flags)
_meta.source: StatsBomb 72 intl matches (half-splits, no odds); goals from club raw 106k
_meta.SOT_definition: on-target = {Goal, Saved, Saved to Post}; EXCLUDES Blocked (matches contest/Opta SOT)
_meta.TOP_OPEN_FRONTIER__DATA_WALL: No single dataset has BOTH half-splits AND odds. StatsBomb = halves, no odds; club corpus = odds, no half corners/SOT. This BLOCKS fitting favorite_gap-conditioned half models and forces base-rate floors on corners/cards. Cracking this (sourcing or constructing a joint half-split + odds dataset) is the HIGH-PRIORITY open item that would convert the floored families to true conditional theta. NOT closed.
_meta.leakage_note: full->half persistence is INFLATED (half is part of full); used leakage-free 1H<->2H for the true carry.

sot_2h__re-center.finding: The conditional RATE_SOT_CMP route uses Skellam P(A>B) which already accounts for ties -> it centers at ~0.41 for an EVEN matchup (0.407-0.421), statistically indistinguishable from the measured base rate 0.438 (SE ~0.04 on 72 matches). The resolved-row mean of 0.508 was favorite-pull, not a 0.5 center. NO intercept shift wired (would be a tiny, unjustified +0.025 nudge). Family STAYS CONDITIONAL (it beat a flat base-rate anchor by +71.86 on 11 resolved rows).

corner_per_half__replace_0.65_shrink.old: CORNER_HALF_SHRINK=0.65 centered at 0.5 — PROVEN WRONG (doubly miscalibrated)
corner_per_half__replace_0.65_shrink.why_stopgap: flat ~0.40 for EVERY match ignores favorite_gap, which demonstrably matters for full-match corners; corner dominance barely persists per-half (1H<->2H carry +0.031) so we can't size a tilt, AND no joint half+odds data to fit one (data wall). Beats the actually-submitted flat shadow (Morocco Q2 0.389 vs 0.493 on a NO) but loses to the discarded favorite_gap on extreme underdogs — exactly why it's flagged unsolved. Open.

goals_H1_SHARE.note: = the wired constant; total-goals conditioning gradient 0.425->0.445 negligible

corners_1h.reason: data wall blocks favorite_gap-conditioned half model; flat floor ignores favorite_gap. OPEN.

cards_2h_over_1plus.reason: base-rate floor, n=1 resolved (lowest confidence), unconditioned. Not validated, not true P. OPEN.

cards_more_2h.reason: base-rate floor, huge ties, low-count non-predictable. OPEN.

offsides_over.reason: base-rate floor; NEVER gate-tested for conditioning. OPEN.

benched_player_sot_over.reason: no P(on)xP(SOT|minutes) model; super-sub band direction-right/magnitude-uncertain. OPEN.
